name: part_011
file: tmp_【#兎田ぺこら6周年記念LIVE】周年3D LIVE！ぺこらRUSH！！！！！！！ぺこ！【ホロライブ⧸兎田ぺこら】 [E2D_YFRHFG8]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_011.webm

scenes.description: Performance of the song "Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore" by Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, and Shirogane Noel.
Pekora finds herself alone after the performance and speaks to the audience.

subtitles.original: 悲しい日々が化石に変わるよ
subtitles.english: Sad days will turn into fossils

subtitles.original: もうすぐ
subtitles.english: very soon

subtitles.original: あなたのその痛みを眠りの森へと
subtitles.english: Into the forest of sleep, I'll take your pain

subtitles.original: 密やかに導いてあげる
subtitles.english: and lead you there quietly.

subtitles.original: おやすみすべてに
subtitles.english: Goodnight to everything,

subtitles.original: 一途すぎた迷い子たち
subtitles.english: to the stray children who were too earnest.

subtitles.original: はかない たゆたい 夢に
subtitles.english: In a fleeting, drifting dream,

subtitles.original: シンクロする日まで
subtitles.english: until the day we synchronize.

subtitles.original: 命はまぶしい 朝を待っている
subtitles.english: Life is waiting for the radiant morning

subtitles.original: 最後の懺悔もかなわないなら
subtitles.english: if even the last confession cannot be granted.

subtitles.original: いつか時代の夜が明ける
subtitles.english: Someday the night of this era will break.

subtitles.original: 世界よ まぶたを閉じて
subtitles.english: Oh world, close your eyelids.

subtitles.original: 命は目覚めて 時を紡ぎ出す
subtitles.english: Life wakes up and begins to spin time

subtitles.original: あなたの証拠をさかのぼるように
subtitles.english: as if to trace back the evidence of your existence.

subtitles.original: そして光が胸に届く
subtitles.english: And then the light will reach your heart.

subtitles.original: 心よ原始に戻れ
subtitles.english: O heart, return to the origin!

subtitles.original: 涙の岸辺で ずっとたたずんだ
subtitles.english: Standing forever on the shore of tears,

subtitles.original: 気持ちを
subtitles.english: these feelings...

subtitles.original: 優しく包むように 秘密の薬が
subtitles.english: Like a gentle embrace, a secret medicine

subtitles.original: 思い出の沖へと運ぶよ
subtitles.english: will carry them to the offshore of memories.

subtitles.original: おやすみ モラルに
subtitles.english: Goodnight to morals,

subtitles.original: 汚れていた指も耳も
subtitles.english: to the fingers and ears that were soiled.

subtitles.original: この腕の中で さあ 眠りなさい
subtitles.english: Within these arms, now, please sleep.

subtitles.original: 命はまぶしい 朝を待っている
subtitles.english: Life is waiting for the radiant morning

subtitles.original: 破れた聖書を抱きしめるより
subtitles.english: instead of clutching a torn Bible.

subtitles.original: いつか時代の夜が明ける
subtitles.english: Someday the night of this era will break.

subtitles.original: あなたよ 祈りを捨てて
subtitles.english: You, throw away your prayers.

subtitles.original: 命は目覚めて 時を紡ぎ出す
subtitles.english: Life wakes up and begins to spin time

subtitles.original: 自然の法則に その身をまかせ
subtitles.english: entrusting your body to the laws of nature.

subtitles.original: そして光が胸に届く
subtitles.english: And then the light will reach your heart.

subtitles.original: 心よ原始に戻れ
subtitles.english: O heart, return to the origin!

subtitles.original: 命はまぶしい 朝を待っている
subtitles.english: Life is waiting for the radiant morning

subtitles.original: 最後の懺悔もかなわないなら
subtitles.english: if even the last confession cannot be granted.

subtitles.original: いつか時代の夜が明ける
subtitles.english: Someday the night of this era will break.

subtitles.original: 世界よ まぶたを閉じて
subtitles.english: Oh world, close your eyelids.

subtitles.original: 命は目覚めて 時を紡ぎ出す
subtitles.english: Life wakes up and begins to spin time

subtitles.original: あなたの証拠をさかのぼるように
subtitles.english: as if to trace back the evidence of your existence.

subtitles.original: そして光が胸に届く
subtitles.english: And then the light will reach your heart.

subtitles.original: 心よ原始に戻れ
subtitles.english: O heart, return to the origin!

subtitles.original: ノエル…
subtitles.english: Noel...

subtitles.original: フレア…
subtitles.english: Flare...

subtitles.original: マリン…
subtitles.english: Marine...

subtitles.original: みんなどこ行っちゃったぺこなの…
subtitles.english: Everyone, where did you all go, peko?

subtitles.original: まぁいっか、3期生ならなんとかなるよな、きっと。
subtitles.english: Oh well, I'm sure the 3rd gen will be fine.

subtitles.original: ということで、ここまでたくさんのゲストのみんなとたくさんの曲を歌ってきましたが、
subtitles.english: So, I've sung many songs with many guests so far,

subtitles.original: みんな、様子はどうぺこ？
subtitles.english: but how are you all doing, peko?
